records.Name: Rock Salt
records.Description: Rock salt is naturally mined halite (sodium chloride) commonly used for winter deicing. It is a cost-effective and efficient solution for melting snow and ice on roads, highways, driveways, sidewalks, parking lots, and industrial outdoor surfaces. Available in both bulk and bagged formats, it meets ASTM D632 standards and can be used alone, in brine form, or pre-storm as an anti-icing agent.
records.Product_Features__c: 1.Easy Storage & Handling: Stores well with anti-caking agents available; both bulk and portable bagged forms 2.Rapid Melting: Provides immediate melt action with fine crystals; coarse crystals ensure lasting effectiveness. 3.Cost effective
records.Product_Specifications__c: 1.Chemical Composition: ≥99% sodium chloride 2.Effective Melting Temperature: Typically effective down to ~15 °F (–9 °C) 3.Crystal Sizes: Blend of fine and coarse crystals—small crystals melt quickly, large provide sustained action
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c: 1.Keep rock salt dry and in a covered container or sealed bag to prevent clumping.2.Inspection: Periodically check bulk storage for moisture and lumps; break up compacted areas manually

records.Name: EcoClean Pet Safe Ice Melt
records.Description: This product is a salt-free, pet-safe ice melt made from 100% magnesium chloride hexahydrate. It melts ice effectively down to about −15 °F, while being non-toxic, biodegradable, and safer for pets, plants, concrete, and metal surfaces. It's perfect for driveways, walkways, and steps.
records.Product_Features__c: Safe for pets – gentle on paws and non-toxic. 2.Eco-friendly – biodegradable and less harmful to plants and soil. 3.Works in very cold temperatures (down to about −15 °F).
records.Product_Specifications__c: • Effective Temperature: Effective to –15°F (–26°C) • Composition: Magnesium Chloride Hexahydrate • Packaging: Typically sold in 15 lb or 35 lb pails •  Form: Round pellets compatible with spreaders
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c: •Gloves and eyewear recommended. •Keep products away from children • Safe for plants and concrete when used as directed

records.Name: Circular Saw
records.Description: A 7-1/4 in corded circular saw purpose built for framing, remodel, and sheet goods work. The magnesium shoe keeps weight low while maintaining rigidity for straight rips. An electric brake stops the blade quickly when the trigger is released, improving safety on active job sites. Depth and bevel scales are large and easy to read, supporting accurate bevel cuts for roof framing or cabinetry.
records.Product_Features__c: • Electric brake for fast blade stop  • Anti snag lower guard  • Dust blower clears cut line  • Clear depth and bevel scales
records.Product_Specifications__c: •Tool Dimensions: 12.5 in (L) × 9.5 in (H) × 8.0 in (W)  • Weight: 8.8 lb  • Blade: 7-1/4 in carbide tipped; 5/8 in arbor  • Motor Speed: 5,200 RPM  • Bevel Range: 0–56° with stops at 22.5° and 45° • Materials: Magnesium shoe; aluminum guard; rubber grip
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c: • Avoid cutting materials with hidden fasteners • Use sharp, clean blades; store dry • Keep hands away from blade path • Wear glasses and a dust mask and ear protection

records.Name: Hammer Drill
records.Description: A dual mode Corded/cordless hammer drill  designed for concrete anchors and masonry holes. The hammering mechanism accelerates drilling through block and poured concrete. An all metal ratcheting chuck resists bit slip, and the side handle with depth rod helps place anchors at consistent embedment depths required in building work.
records.Product_Features__c: • Side handle and depth rod  • Heavy duty all metal chuck  • LED light and belt hook  • Selectable hammer mode
records.Product_Specifications__c: • Dimensions: 9.0 in (L) × 8.0 in (H) × 3.3 in (W)  • Weight: 4.0 lb  • Chuck: 1/2 in metal ratcheting  • Modes: Drill/Drive/Hammer; 0–500 / 0–1,800 RPM  • Impact Rate: up to 28,000 BPM  • Materials: Metal gear case; polymer body
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c: • Wear eye protection and dust mask • Avoid live wires when drilling • Keep vents clear of concrete dust • Lightly grease chuck if specified

records.Name: ECOSALT ICE MELT
records.Description: EcoSalt is an eco-friendly ice melt solution engineered for high performance in extreme winter conditions. It combines a sodium chloride base with natural beet-derived organic additives and corrosion inhibitors, delivering rapid melting while minimizing environmental impact.
records.Product_Features__c: 1.Works in very cold temps (down to –20 °F)2.Eco-friendly, beet-based formula3.Less corrosive—protects surfaces and equipment4.Sticks better, less scatter
records.Product_Specifications__c: • Effective Temperature: Works down to –20°F (–29°C)  • Eco Advantage: Reduces salt usage by up to 30%, lowers corrosion by 60%, and minimizes chloride runoff  • Composition: Sodium chloride treated with organic accelerator and anti-corrosion agents • Ide
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c: •Gloves and eyewear recommended. •Keep products away from children and pets •Mild eye/skin irritant; ingestion may cause upset.

records.Name: Measuring Tape
records.Description: Professional 25 ft tape measures (PowerLock/FatMax) with Mylar-coated blades, BladeArmor at hook and Tru-Zero hook for accurate inside/outside measurements.
records.Product_Features__c:
1. Durable steel blade with protective coating 
2.Clear inch/metric markings for versatile use 
3. Positive lock and smooth retraction
 4. Shock-resistant casing
records.Product_Specifications__c:

records.Name: Level (9 in)
records.Description:
The  Level (9 in) is a compact, precision tool designed for professionals
and DIY enthusiasts. Its small size makes it perfect for working in tight spaces, such as plumbing,
electrical installations, and cabinetry. Constructed with durable materials and equipped with
high-visibility vials, this level ensures accurate readings and long-lasting reliability
records.Product_Features__c:
• Compact design for easy portability
• Shock-resistant body for durability
• High-visibility vials for quick readings
• Ergonomic grip for comfortable handling
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Length: 9 inches
• Material: High-grade aluminum
• Accuracy: ±0.5 mm/m
• Weight: 0.5 lbs
• Color: Silver with anti-corrosion coating
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Clean with a soft cloth after use
• Avoid exposure to extreme temperatures
• Store in a dry place to prevent corrosion
• Do not drop or apply excessive force

records.Name: Tile Cutter
records.Description:
A professional, score-and-snap tile cutter engineered for straight and diagonal cuts on ceramic and porcelain
tiles. The 24 in rail provides smooth carriage travel, while the tungsten carbide cutting wheel delivers clean,
chip-minimized scores. Dual chrome-plated guide rails and a reinforced base increase rigidity for repeatable
results on renovation and commercial jobs.
records.Product_Features__c:
• Ergonomic, anti-slip handle reduces wrist fatigue on long runs
• High-visibility measurement scale in inches for rapid set-up
• Adjustable rip fence and 45° miter guide for diagonal cuts
• Spring-loaded base pads to absorb impact during snapping
• Quick-change wheel mechanism for on-site maintenance
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Material: Hardened steel rails; aluminum base;
• Max cut length: 24 in; Max tile thickness: 1/2 in
• Overall dimensions: 29 in L × 8 in W × 7 in H
• Weight: 13 lb
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Wipe rails and base after use to remove slurry and dust
• Wear safety glasses and gloves during cutting
• Store dry; avoid impacts that may misalign the fence
• Lightly oil guide rails weekly to maintain smooth carriage travel

records.Name: Rust Resistant Steel Tile Nipper
records.Description:
Precision tile nipper for shaping and trimming small sections, curves, and notches. Rust-resistant alloy steel
jaws maintain sharp edges, while the compound-leverage design increases bite force for controlled nibbling on
ceramic mosaics and porcelain trims.
records.Product_Features__c:
• Micro-serrated jaws improve grip and reduce tile slip
• Dual-spring return for smoother, faster repetitive cuts
• Overmolded handles for comfort and vibration reduction
• Jaw stop limiter to prevent over-biting and edge cracking
• Corrosion-resistant finish for humid jobsite conditions
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Material: Rust-resistant alloy steel jaws; 
• Overall length: 8 in; Jaw width: 3/4 in
• Recommended tile types: Ceramic, porcelain mosaic (≤ 3/8 in thick)
• Weight: 0.9 lb
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Brush off shards after use; avoid grinding against metal surfaces
• Apply a light machine oil to pivot weekly to prevent squeak and corrosion
• Do not use on glass tile without a scoring step; risk of shattering
•Wear cut-resistant gloves and eye protection

records.Name: Professional Tile Adhesive
records.Description:
Professional-grade, polymer-reinforced tile adhesive designed for interior wall and floor tile installations. Engineered for
ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone mosaics up to 12×12 in. Its creamy, non-sag consistency allows extended open
time for precise layout, while high initial grab minimizes tile slip on vertical surfaces. Formulated for high bond strength,
excellent water resistance in intermittent-wet areas (kitchens, baths), and low odor for occupied spaces.
Ready-to-use—no mixing or slaking required.
records.Product_Features__c:
• High bond strength for ceramic/porcelain/natural stone
• Non-sag formula for walls; smooth trowel spread on floors
• Extended open time for complex layouts
• Low odor and soap and water cleanup
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Volume: 1 Gallon
• Coverage: ~40 sq. ft.
• Color: White
• Application temperature: 50–95 °F (10–35 °C)
• Cure time: Light traffic 24–48 hrs; full cure ~72 hrs
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Close lid tightly; store between 40–90 °F
• Do not freeze; discard if gelled
• Wear nitrile gloves; avoid skin/eye contact
• Ventilate during use; do not ingest

records.Name: Traditional Tile Spacers
records.Description:
Classic cross-shaped spacers that maintain uniform 1/8 in grout joints for ceramic and porcelain installations.
Rigid polymer resists compression, ensuring consistent layout across floors and walls.
records.Product_Features__c:
• True-to-size 1/8 in thickness for consistent joints
• High-visibility white color for easy removal
• Re-usable when kept clean and undamaged
• Compatible with tile leveling systems
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Material: High-density polyethylene (HDPE)
• Spacer thickness: 1/8 in (0.125 in)
• Pack size: 200 pieces
• Operating temperature: 40°F to 120°F
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Collect and rinse after use; store in a sealable container
• Do not leave embedded in cured grout; remove before setting
• Keep out of direct sunlight to prevent warping
•  Gloves recommended when handling grout removal

records.Name: Grouting Cleaning and Washing Sponge
records.Description:
This large-format grouting and washing sponge is purpose-built for tile installation cleanup. The
open-cell polyurethane matrix absorbs and holds a high volume of rinse water, allowing installers to
float the surface and lift grout haze without streaking. Rounded corners glide over joints so you won’t
gouge fresh grout lines, and the firm internal structure resists collapse under hand pressure for
consistent passes. It’s equally effective for general-purpose washing on masonry and sealed stone
where a gentle, non-scratching touch is required.
records.Product_Features__c:
• Open-cell structure holds rinse water and releases evenly
• Rounded edges reduce drag over grout lines
• Rigid core resists collapse under hand pressure
• Colorfast material will not bleed onto light tile
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Material: High-density polyurethane (PU) foam
• Dimensions: 7.5 in L × 5.5 in W × 2.0 in H
• Absorption: ≥ 7× dry mass
• Weight: ~0.30 lb
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Rinse until water runs clear; squeeze—do not wring—to preserve cell structure
• Air-dry fully between uses to prevent mildew
• Do not use with acidic cleaners stronger than pH 3
• Wear nitrile gloves when handling fresh grout

records.Name: All Purpose Mixing Container
records.Description:
Heavy-duty 5 gallon bucket designed for mixing grout, thinset, mortar, and patching compounds. Thick HDPE
walls resist deformation, and molded quart/liter markings support accurate water ratios for
manufacturer-specified mixes.
records.Product_Features__c:
• Reinforced rim and base for stability with paddle mixing
• Comfort-grip bail handle for carrying on site
• Flat interior bottom improves mixing vortex formation
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Material: High-density polyethylene (HDPE)
• Capacity: 5 gal (19 L)
• Dimensions: 12 in diameter × 15 in height
• Weight: 2.2 lb
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Rinse immediately after mixing;
• Do not use with solvents incompatible with HDPE
• Store away from UV exposure to prolong service life
• Wear splash-resistant goggles when mixing

records.Name: Grout Sealer
records.Description:
Water based penetrating grout sealer that repels stains from food, oil, and household contaminants while allowing
vapor transmission. Ideal for sanded and unsanded grout joints on ceramic and porcelain tile in kitchens, baths, and
backsplashes. Clear, non yellowing protection maintains the original grout color.
records.Product_Features__c:
• Penetrating formula; breathable
• Resists water, oil, and common stains
• Low odor; quick recoat
• Non yellowing, clear finish
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Volume: 12 oz (355 mL) spray
• Coverage: ~50–150 sq ft (joint width dependent)
• Material: Water based fluoropolymer/alkoxysilane blend
• Cure time: Light use 2–4 hrs; full cure 24 hrs
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Re seal high traffic/wet areas annually
• Wipe spills promptly to prevent staining
• Use neutral pH cleaner; avoid acids/bleach on fresh sealer
• Provide ventilation during application

records.Name: Drywall Primer
records.Description:
Contractor grade PVA drywall primer formulated to seal new gypsum board, joint compound, and patched surfaces.
Promotes uniform porosity and sheen holdout for topcoats, reducing lap marks and improving color accuracy.
Low VOC, fast drying, and spray/roll/brush compatible for high productivity interiors.
records.Product_Features__c:
• Seals porous drywall and joint compound
• Fast dry; topcoat in as little as 1 hour (conditions dependent)
• Low VOC; low odor
• Easy soap and water cleanup
records.Product_Specifications__c:
• Volume: 5 gallons (18.9 L)
• Color/finish: White, flat
• Coverage: ~350–400 sq ft/gal (1,750–2,000 sq ft per pail)
• Material/base: PVA (polyvinyl acetate) latex
• Recommended film: 1 coat over new drywall
• Application temperature: ≥50 °F (10 °C)
records.Product_Maintenance_Safety__c:
• Keep container closed; prevent skinning
• Do not allow to freeze
• Ventilate during application; wear safety glasses
• Dispose in accordance with local regulations

records.Name: Bathtub
records.Description: Bathtubs provide a relaxing bathing experience and come in various materials and styles, from alcove installations to freestanding designs. They are designed for durability, comfort, and aesthetic appeal.

records.Name: Ceramic Tiles
records.Description: Glazed ceramic tiles for walls and low-traffic floors. They combine easy cleaning with diverse colors and patterns, making them a cost-effective choice for bathrooms and kitchens.

• Glazed surfaces with wide finish options

• Slip resistant textures available

records.Name: Porcelain Tiles
records.Description: Dense, low-porosity porcelain ideal for high-traffic floors and wet zones. Rectified edges allow tight grout lines for a premium look indoors and outdoors.

• Water Absorption: ≤ 0.5% 
• PEI: Class IV–V
• Slip Resistance: R10–R11
• Edges: rectified for tight joints

• Seal grout only; porcelain itself typically does not require sealing.

records.Name: Vinyl  Tiles

records.Name: Wall Mount Dual Fixed and Handheld Shower Head
records.Description: A versatile handheld shower designed for everyday comfort and cleaning. The balanced head and ergonomic grip let you switch seamlessly between soothing rain and targeted massage. records.Name: Stainless Steel Shower Hose

records.Name: High-Arc Bathroom Faucet
records.Description: Single-handle faucet with a tall spout that clears vessel sinks, providing comfortable space for washing. Smooth lever action and an integrated aerator enhance daily convenience.

records.Name: Wall Cabinet
records.Description: Wall Cabinet is a compact, space‑saving storage solution designed for versatile use in garages, bathrooms, kitchens, laundry rooms, and home interiors. Its sturdy, moisture‑resistant build keeps items protected, while adjustable shelves make it easy to store tools, toiletries, cleaning supplies, or everyday essentials. With a clean modern design and secure doors, it helps reduce clutter and keeps frequently used items organized and within reach—perfect for any room that needs efficient vertical storage .
records.Product_Features__c:
